mapper.sql: id, username, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, bio, disable_reason, role, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM blog_user WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= #{date} AND created_at < DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= #{date}
SELECT FROM blog_user WHERE (username = #{account} OR email = #{account}) AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 1000) + 1 FROM blog_user WHERE id < 10000000000
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO blog_user
id, username, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, bio, disable_reason, role, status, created_at, updated_at,
#{id}, #{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{bio}, #{disableReason}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_user SET username = #{username}, email = #{email}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, bio = #{bio}, disable_reason = #{disableReason}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, u.password_hash, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.disable_reason, u.role, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted_at, u.version FROM blog_user u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT following_user_id, COUNT(*) as fc FROM blog_user_follow WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY following_user_id ) fc ON u.id = fc.following_user_id WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status = 'NORMAL'
AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.bio LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY
COALESCE(fc.fc, 0) DESC, u.id DESC
u.id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user u WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status = 'NORMAL'
AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.bio LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user_follow WHERE following_user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE author_id = #{userId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_user (id, username, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, bio, disable_reason, role, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{bio}, #{disableReason}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE username = #{username}, email = #{email}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, bio = #{bio}, disable_reason = #{disableReason}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW()
